name: Healthcare
commonRegulations: Patient data cannot leave the processing environment
All AI-assisted decisions must be auditable
PHI must be de-identified before LLM processing
failureConsequences: Patient harm, regulatory fines up to $1.5M per violation, loss of medical license, malpractice liability

name: Fintech
commonRegulations: Financial advice must carry appropriate disclaimers
Transaction data requires encryption at rest and in transit
Model decisions affecting credit must be explainable
failureConsequences: Financial losses, regulatory penalties, SEC enforcement actions, customer fund mismanagement, loss of banking license

name: Legal
commonRegulations: AI-generated legal content must be reviewed by licensed attorney
Client confidential information cannot be used for model training
Citations must reference real, verifiable cases
failureConsequences: Malpractice suits, bar sanctions, case dismissal, hallucinated case citations (Mata v. Avianca precedent), client harm

name: E-Commerce
commonRegulations: Product claims must be substantiated
Pricing information must be accurate
Return/refund policies must be faithfully represented
failureConsequences: Customer churn, refund disputes, FTC enforcement, brand reputation damage, revenue loss from incorrect pricing

name: Enterprise SaaS
commonRegulations: Data residency requirements per customer contract
Audit logging of all AI-assisted actions
Data isolation between tenants
failureConsequences: SLA breaches, enterprise contract termination, data breach liability, loss of customer trust, competitive disadvantage

name: Education
commonRegulations: Student data requires parental consent for minors
AI tutoring must not replace qualified instruction
Content must be age-appropriate and bias-free
failureConsequences: Student data exposure, FERPA violations, harmful content exposure to minors, institutional liability, loss of accreditation

name: Government
commonRegulations: AI systems must undergo algorithmic impact assessments
Classified data must never be processed by external LLMs
All AI-assisted decisions affecting citizens must be explainable and appealable
failureConsequences: National security breaches, loss of public trust, congressional investigations, contract debarment, civil liberties violations

name: Insurance
commonRegulations: Underwriting decisions must not discriminate based on protected classes
Claims processing AI must provide explainable denial reasons
Policyholder data must be encrypted and access-audited
failureConsequences: Discriminatory underwriting penalties, wrongful claim denials, state regulatory actions, class-action lawsuits, license revocation

name: Cybersecurity
commonRegulations: Threat intelligence data must not be leaked to adversaries via LLM APIs
Automated response actions must have human approval for critical systems
AI-generated security advisories must be verified against CVE databases
failureConsequences: Adversary exploitation of AI-leaked intelligence, false positive incident response causing outages, automated actions escalating security incidents, breach of classified threat data

name: Recruitment/HR
commonRegulations: AI screening tools must undergo annual bias audits
Candidates must be notified when AI is used in hiring decisions
Resume screening must not discriminate based on protected characteristics
failureConsequences: Discriminatory hiring lawsuits, EEOC enforcement actions, reputational damage, loss of diverse talent pipeline, regulatory fines up to $1,500 per violation
